impact: This advances the PP&D lifecycle requirement validation sequence by proving the fixture validator rejects duplicate `(categoryId, action, object, sourceEvidenceIds)` records while staying fixture-only and deterministic.
summary: Add the checkbox-27f duplicate requirement-key mutation validator.
target_task: Task checkbox-36: Recovery for checkbox-27f: after checkbox-27e passes, add one mutation case for duplicate `(categoryId, action, object, sourceEvidenceIds)` only.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
